title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.844 - Applicability of certain statutes
text:
210.844.  Applicability of certain statutes. — In a proceeding to determine the existence of the parent and child relationship brought under sections 454.850 to 454.997* or under sections 454.1500 to 454.1728, the provisions of sections 210.817, 210.822, 210.823, 210.834, and 210.836 shall apply, but no other provisions of sections 210.818 through 210.852 shall apply.
(L. 1998 S.B. 910, A.L. 2011 H.B. 260) 
*Sections 454.850 to 454.999 were repealed by H.B. 1550 and S.B. 905 & 992, 2016.
